title: BitMEX Guide: Margin trading is not complicated -Part 1/3
author: Pro_ambitious
selftext:
This is an ultimate and currently the only one in its kind [Bitmex](https://www.bitmex.com/register/e0lvud) guide that covers all crucial and tiny details that most of the authors in the entire world wide web have either underestimated or forgot to elaborate as they should have…
